title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: LAKE OSWEGO ADULT COMMUNITY CENTER DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily during the winter season. Offers access to Wi-Fi, coffee, tea, and computers. Lunch is served three days a week. 505 G Avenue Lake Oswego, OR 97034 Eligibility: Varies by site Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Lunch: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 11:30am-noon (503) 635-3758 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 635-3758 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call ahead or visit website to confirm hours. FEES: Center: None Lunch: $4 for age 60 and older, $5 for age 59 and younger DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Four blocks from the Lake Oswego transit station at Safeway. Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LAKE OSWEGO ADULT COMMUNITY CENTER
